div.p: Technical blueprint for Transformer training stability

g.text: Note: beta2=0.98 is tuned for Transformers

div.p: η_t = d_model^(-0.5) * min( t^(-0.5), t * warmup_steps^(-1.5) )
η_t = η_min + 0.5 * (η_max - η_min) * (1 + cos(π * (t - T_warm) / (T_total - T_warm)))

ul.li: Random Init: Gradients have high variance.
Adam Momentum: Early noisy updates get locked into momentum buffers.
LayerNorm: Allows deeper layers to stabilize before large updates.
